name: NíneLives
lore: We build constantly.
whatToVisit:
We recommend this route to see the best of our current rotation:

**The Lobby Entrance: **Home to our custom mini cat tree, and a serene Buddha shrine.

**The Party Area:** Features a fully-stocked bar and party area. PS. You will also find a highly engineered toilet around this area with both sit and smell functionality built in.

**The Arena:** A three-story complex. Relax in the lounge, visit the bar, or head to the roof for a seat right on the edge of the platform.

**The Lake: **A modern architectural build with tranquil waterfront views. Visit the central pavilion to see our builders' creativity on full display.

Last but not least...

**The Wall: Our main attraction. What lies beyond the wall??? You'll have to explore to find out.**

name: Desolate
lore: Our goal is to have something for everyone and enough bases to switch monthly. We are currently up to 4 complete base diagrams all built by myself (GvG Base, Hexi Desert Base, Nature Base, and Snow Base). I want to create an amazing home for all my members and keep the game alive and active. Feel free to drop in and talk about building!
whatToVisit: Colosseum (GvG base), Three floor Hexi spectator area (Hexi Base) , guild beach (Nature Base), beautiful nature themed party area (Nature Base), parkour floating islands and airships (GvG Base), Dance party area (Hexi Base), wild horse racing track feat. obstacles (GvG base), lakehouse (GvG base), theatre (GvG base and Hexi Base), mini gvg model (GvG base), big GvG model (GvG base and Hexi base), swim-up bar (GvG base), log cabins (snow base), frozen creek bridge (snow base), hot spring lake area (snow base), frozen party area (snow base)

name: TigreEcarlate
lore:
The Scarlet Tigers were born from the alliance of three brothers-in-arms, united by friendship, glory, and blood.
Forged in battle, they swore to never yield nor abandon their own.
Their crimson banner embodies every fight, every sacrifice, and their unbreakable will.
More than a guild, they are a brotherhood built on honor and strength.
Their ambition is clear: to found a dynasty that even time itself cannot erase.
whatToVisit: River, water arena, open-air restaurant

name: LimitedEdition
lore:
Before your eyes unfolds a quiet corner of an Eastern world, where time seems to slow down and dissolve into the light. By day, the garden is filled with gentle freshness: clear water reflects elegant pavilions with carved roofs, bamboo rustles among stones and greenery, while crimson maples add a living flame to the calm palette of nature.

As evening falls, the space transforms — golden light glides across wooden railings and water, turning everything into a warm, almost dreamlike scene. Inside the pavilions, a sense of comfort and silence lingers, as if this place were meant for unhurried conversations and thoughts that require no answers.

At night, the world sinks into a deep, velvety darkness animated by soft lantern light. Their reflections shimmer on the damp stone paths, creating a feeling of warmth and gentle mystery. The space becomes more intimate, almost personal, as if it belongs only to you and that quiet glow.

This place lives in the rhythm of light — from the clear calm of day to the warm reflection of evening and the mysterious silence of night, remaining endlessly harmonious and untouched by the noise of the outside world.
whatToVisit:
🛍️ *Left of the entrance*
Follow the path to the trading square, where you can buy food, fabrics, and spices. A little further ahead you’ll find a visitor bar with a great view of the PvP arena — the perfect place to watch battles and discuss victories and defeats.

🍵 *Behind the entrance*
Walking down the path will lead you to one of the coziest places on the base — a peaceful lake. Here you can relax in the tea house, catch your breath in the inner bar, or even host a banquet in our “Chinese Hogwarts”.

⛩️ *Up the mountain path*
And if your soul seeks redemption after a few questionable adventures, climb the path up the hill — at the top you’ll find a temple for prayer and quiet reflection.

⚔️ *Right of the entrance*
This road leads to an additional arena for the most resilient fighters. Across from it is the entrance to a stone garden of solitude — a calm place for peaceful walks away from the bustle.

💆 *Through the stone garden*
If you continue through the garden, you’ll reach the massage salon (massage therapist positions are currently open). The spa area also includes a swimming pool, a sauna, and diving platforms for jumping competitions.

✨ Our guild base was designed so that everyone can find a place here for rest, adventure, or new experiences. Welcome — and make yourself at home.

name: DanmeiSect
lore: DanmeiSect has no set lore, as we are all danmei fans! We have plenty of people who in-game cosplay and roleplay as their characters in the game, and even have OC's people have created! Our builds were all made with the ability to take pictures in mind!
whatToVisit:
We have different themed areas to go along with different danmei's people may or may not have read! 
Come visit our best adaptations of:

- the Thousand Autumns home! (*taken inspiration from the donghua*)
- Chu Wanning's house (*taken inspiration from The Husky and His White Cat Shizun novels*)
- Puqi Shrine (*taken inspiration from Heaven Official's Blessing donghua and novels*)
- the Inn (*taken inspiration from The Grandmaster of Demonic Cultivation donghua and novels*)
- the Bamboo House and woodshed (*taken inspiration from Scum Villains Self Saving System novels and donghua*)
- Lan clan rules and Ling Xi Caves (*taken inspiration from Scum Villain and Grandmaster*)

Even though we have themed builds, we also have custom builds as well! Such as:

- Our mini maze!
- Our medical malpractice ladder <3
- Our performance hall
- Our guild party area! 

Thank you for taking the time to read this, and we hope you come by and try to find our 25 hidden guild pickles~ 

*Not everything is pictured as to keep things brief!*

name: Clandestine
builders: HazelWind (Credits to Jiziu - Summer Palace main residence)
lore:
The Hidden Sanctuary

Clandestine reveals itself only to those who seek stillness and tranquility in the Jianghu. It is a quiet haven of maple-lined paths, lakeside pavilions, and serene gardens where time seems to slow. 

Within its grounds, every space invites reflection. The Bamboo Forest softens the mind, the Zen Garden and baths restore both body and spirit, and the Hanging Gardens rise as a silent reminder of the connection between earth and sky. Even the grand avenues and imperial structures serve not symbols of power, but of legacy—echoes of a past devoted to defending peace rather than to conquer the world.

At its heart stands the Summer Palace, where those who guard this sanctuary gather not to rule, but to guide. They remain unseen, not out of secrecy, but out of safety, allowing the base to exist as a refuge for those who arrive not by chance, but by need for peace.
whatToVisit:
Feel free to come and visit us, we have:  
🍁 Maple Avenue  
⚔️ Arena viewing platform  
🪷 Lake Pavilion complex with wooden bridge and roundabout  
🛀 a Zen Garden and Bath House  
🎍 Bamboo Forest (inspired by the Arashiyama bamboo forest in Kyoto)  
🔭  Hanging Gardens with Torii Gates and Vantage Point at the top.  
🏟️ Colosseum  
🛣️ Grand Boulevard just past the Maple Avenue  
☕ Shopping Street with a Ghibli-style Cafe, a Bookstore, and a Boutique, very photogenic!  
🏰 A huge Summer Palace complex (this is the latest addition, built with the help of our new builder Jiziuu)
🏇  and... a Derby circuit!
note: we have the full aisle, ceremony area and dinner reception area!

name: Dragons-Heirs
lore: Dragon City is the seat of Dragons-Heirs — a living capital shaped by the will of the Divine Dragon. Built upon layered platforms of stone and discipline, it stands as both sanctuary and stronghold. Here, warriors are forged, traditions are honored, and the path of the dragon is carried forward into every battle and every moment of peace.
whatToVisit:
**• Dragon Palace (Throne Room)**
 — *the central seat of power overlooking the entire city*
**• Royal Garden** 
— *a tranquil sanctuary offering peace and balance
**• Barracks & Training Grounds **
— where warriors are trained and prepared for war*
**• Dragon Shrine** 
— *a sacred place honoring the Dragon God and the legacy of all dragons, offering peace and reflection*
**• Performance Court **
— *a vibrant space where music, gatherings, and celebrations come alive*
**• Inn & Wedding Area **
— *a place for rest, bonds, and new beginnings*
**• Bar at the Party Pool **
— *a lively place where members gather during events to relax, drink, and celebrate*
**• Arena Food Stalls** 
— *where warriors gather strength before battle*
**• City Roads & Bridge Platforms** 
— *paths that connect the city, used for marches and travel*
**• Hidden Basement**
 — *the secret domain of our Vice Master, hidden beneath the city…*

name: 会Ashura
lore:
**Timeless Seasons and Endless Fantasy**
Hidden within a quiet valley of red maples and still waters, 会Ashura is a place meant to be lived in, not rushed through. Paths weave naturally through the base, while soft lantern light glows only by the lake and along the buildings, reflecting gently across the water at dusk.
A temple rests high on the mountain, watching over everything below, while a quiet theatre and a peaceful zen garden offer space to slow down and breathe. At the center, a floating tree Yggdrasil rises above the rooftops, silently guarding the valley.
By the lake, a single wooden bridge lined with torii gates and lantern light leads across the water, where reflections shimmer at sunset.

Nothing here was planned, it grew over time, shaped by those who stayed.
whatToVisit:
- **Guardian Tree Yggdrasil** - The heart of the guild and a hub to hang  out and enjoy the sunset
- **The Grant Theatre** - Where stories, music and gatherings come alive
- **Aisle and Wedding Garden** - The place to walk down the aisle and gather for those tying the knot and company
- **Lake Resort** - Lit with lanterns across tranquil waters is a place for relaxation, meet up and work in quiet peace and with a hearty view
- **Ancient Library** - Hidden under the Mountain Market is the forgotten library where trees had taken roots and the winter of the hot spring didn't fully absorb in it's coldness
- **Winter Hot springs** - Connected to the library is a place where winter refused to be melted away, yet touched by men. A place to relax, look up to clear skies and magical night light and misty chills
- **Mountain Temple** - In restoration from old times is the structure that watches over all of 会Ashura
- **Sacred Gardens & Courtyards** - Perfect for relaxing and exploring surrounded by great Fengshui

name: AfterFlame
lore:
Welcome everyone to another build by me. It's been a delight to try out the new items from the Hexi map update.

From the very first step inside, visitors are greeted by a breathtaking floral stone mural floor intricately arranged into a circular gathering area. This central space serves as the perfect venue for guild events, casual meetups, and friendly duels, setting the tone for everything that lies beyond.

At the heart of the base stands The Monumental Pond Shrine of Afterflame. Crafted with fish statues and glowing lamps, the shrine radiates a warm and bright guiding beacon that instantly captivates all who enter. A surrounding walkway leads to peaceful observation decks inviting members to pause, reflect, and admire the shrine from every angle.

[More on the original WWM official discord...](https://discord.com/channels/1180042348755963924/1484880517068357643)
whatToVisit:
- Monumental Pond Shrine
- Pole Dance Theater
- Paifang Traditional Gate

🔨  Build: 3-4 Days

🦊  IGN & YT: [FoxiKate](https://www.youtube.com/@FoxiKate)

name: RoninLegacy
lore:
This was such a fun build to work on, and I had full freedom to shape what feels like the start of a beautiful village. You’re welcomed by a long walkway leading to a structure set on a pond, inspired by the elegance of the Taj Mahal (One of the Seven Wonders of the world.)

A winding stone path takes you up a rocky hill to a peaceful temple with a great view over half the guild base. In the center, there’s a lively training ground with a sparring area and a small archery range connecting everything together.

Off to the side sits a charming little floral boutique, perfect for grabbing a gift on your way out and last but not least, a spectator’s corner with a rooftop garden that offers the best view of the arena.

🔨  Build Time: 2-3 Days

🦊  IGN & YT: [FoxiKate](https://www.youtube.com/@FoxiKate) 

[Original WWM official thread](https://discord.com/channels/1180042348755963924/1484880517068357643)
whatToVisit:
- Taj Mahal Seven Wonders Inspired
- Natural Springs
- Floral Boutique

name: SNEJNAYA
lore: In endless snowy wastes, Snejnaya castle stands amid frost and forgotten winds. White stone towers loom under pale skies, shadowed by ghosts in crystal-lit halls.🖤🧊
whatToVisit:
Please visit and see for yourself—the true chill is best felt in person.
•    Party Zone: Lively heart for gatherings and feasts.
•    Castle Grounds: Towering halls and frost-covered walls.
•    Hidden Hot Spring: Steamy cave oasis in the mountains.
•    Throne Room: Seat of ancient power, echoing with history.
•    Graveyard: Silent stones under eternal snow.
•    Chapel: Dimly lit sanctuary of whispers and stone.
•    Haunted Basement: Shadows and ghosts in the depths.
•    Cold Bedroom: Icy chambers for restless slumber.
•    Lions Playing Backgammon: Whimsical guardians at their game.
•    Snowy Inner Courtyard: Cozy rest spot amid falling flakes.

name: IronLotusCo
lore: Aye wassup Yaban here, I've been the majority builder here but of course with some help on ideas and feedback from my awesome guild also keep in mind still a work in progress. But this game brings people from all walks of life together. From the deadliest swords of the Midnight blades, classiest of the VelvetShade, creatives of the Mask Troupe and even the rowdiness of the Raging Tides. That's the idea I had in mind for our Guild and especially our base a fun safe space everyone can enjoy no matter what you're doing on this game
whatToVisit:
• The Ferrous Flow River
• Heavenforge Sky Temple
• Natural Hot springs
• Forrest of Death
• Many Bars
• Tempering Hall Pavilion featuring a stage for our performers
• Marketplace, full of goods
• Treehouse clubhouse called the Lotusshade - features extravagant bar, sections for photos and even a runway with IronLotusCo branding
• The Pit, our "totally safe" training ground for our troops to hone their skills, careful don't fall below onto the spikes and beastly infestation waters below.

name: Clouds
lore:
A celebration of historical Chinese architecture and aesthetics, taking heavy inspiration from wuxia, xianxia, xuanhuan, and historical Cdramas and Chinese media! 

This build is 50% of a planned Celestial City build, which will be completed when component limits increase to 10K.
whatToVisit:
- **Clouds City** - A small city block on your left upon entering 

- **Crimson Maple Floating Pavilion** - To your right, you will find a floating pavilion upon the tranquil waters of Clouds Lake.

- **Spectator Teahouse** - Behind you upon entering is Clouds' Spectator Teahouse

- **Clouds Arena** - Straight ahead of you is Clouds Arena, a majestic arena where exciting spars and dances take place. 

- **Clouds Imperial Palace Grounds** - Through the arena and straight ahead are Clouds' Imperial Palace Grounds, which boasts two levels of ponds and landscaping.

- **Clouds Imperial Garden** - To the right of the grounds, you will find a multi-level garden and hot springs area. 

- **Clouds Palace** - The star of the guild, Clouds Palace, features a large reception hall centered by a performance stage. Each level boasts open balconies and areas for entertaining or quiet scholarship, poetry, and art. 

- **Clouds Lantern Pavilions** - Flanking either side of Cloud Palace are floating lantern pavilions which stand watch over the entire guild base.

name: Noodles
lore:
Our base evolved through multiple events (13 cranes) rewarding members for finding 13 hidden cranes.
Additional places were made either for gameplay purposes or aesthetics.
Today the guild  has very little activity. I myself have moved elsewhere, and the 1rst Builder YiChen is on break.
Over time I have been optimizing the base to cover more and more space with the newer components while keeping the aesthetics.
There is still about 600 components left to use, more optimizations can be made, but no active builders at the moment.
whatToVisit:
- Great tree and Temple to the 1rst 13 cranes
- Covered Sparring place with 2 spectator levels
- Coliseum sparring place linked to it
- Secret Guild party spot in the sky
- Floating Guild Name 
- Floating Islands
- Component efficient Forests
- Secret Garden of the 1rst Great Builder
- Zen Garden and hidden cave, leading to a temple for meditation and praise to water gods
- Small cottages built in the forest, could have been inhabited by an honorable builder back in his days
- Secret places and Upper Islands and Gardens can be hard to access, ping me if you need help to show you the way

name: Vivid
lore: Hidden in the clamor of the martial world lies the sanctuary of Vivid, a land born when crimson roots first pierced the soil and life began to flourish. Explorers, martial artists, and kindred spirits have all found a home here not governed by strict laws, but by participation and presence. Within Vivid, both power and community grow together, shaped by the hands of those who remain. Some see it as a utopia, others as a simple haven, but those who truly understand know the truth: Vivid is not just a refuge it is something you must earn. Like a living forest, only those who actively take part will continue to grow within it.
whatToVisit:
Step into Vivid and discover these spots that bring our world to life:
🎋 Guild Bathhouse – relax beneath nature’s canopy
⚔️ PvP Arena – test your strength
🏡 Pond House – peaceful waterside retreat
🗻 Secondary Arena – hidden battleground behind the guild

name: Kindreds
lore: Our base is designed as a fun place to take lots of pictures and enjoy the moment. Everything here has a story of its own, with hidden easter eggs waiting to be discovered.
whatToVisit:
* Dino
 A cute little guy waiting to greet you when you visit.
* Arena
A forest-themed arena where a throne waits for its rightful owner. Look around carefully, the throne is not the only place you can sit.
* Mega Cat Zoid
Right behind Dino, waiting for you to ride.
* Hidden Easter Eggs Below the Mecha
Beneath the mecha, you’ll find some unusual surprises… including a place that shows what happened to cheating partners. Humanity remains committed to drama, even in fantasy architecture.
* Pond, Restaurant & Water Stage
Head to the pond where you can relax at a restaurant and bar. And don’t miss the water stage at nighttime.
* Underwater World
Behind the restaurant, perhaps a swing will take you diving underwater and reveal a world of its own.
* Spooky Graveyard
Adjacent to the mecha lies a graveyard. Pay your respects… maybe one grave leads to the underworld. If so, explore it and you may find a secret base… or a never-ending abyss.
* Snowy Stairs and Mountain Headquarters
Once done, climb to the top and find the snowy stairs. The entrance is back near the pond. It leads to the leaders’ headquarters in the mountains and a ruined castle at the top. Along the way, there’s also a dance stage.
* Tree House
Climb up the tree house, jump across the roof, and reach the bed. There are a few easter eggs there. Try the bed, and enjoy the sitting spot at the edge.
* Boat Viewpoint
Finally, climb up the boat and enjoy the view.


Note
This guild is still a work in progress, with only 2,500 components utilized so far. Keep checking back, maybe a new story will unfold at Kindreds.

name: KrapaoKai
lore: The guild is built around a sky-sculpture theme. At the center, there’s a large circular structure inspired by an umbrella frame, blended with natural elements. The goal is to make it feel visually calming from any angle. We also added platforms you can jump across like an obby, with a few hidden traps in certain areas. And the restaurant serves Krapao Kai, which is a popular dish in Thailand and also the name of the guild
whatToVisit: Restaurant, Big Unique Structure, parkour, Guild party area, Spaceship, Zen area

name: Wildcat🐾
lore: We are free spirited peeps who love the mountains. So, we added rocks. A lot of rocks. I'm pretty new at building, so most stuff are very experimental and messy. XD But I guess that's the beauty of it. It's small but cozy, so I hope u enjoy ur stay. <3
whatToVisit:
- ☕Wildcat café right next to the entrance built by Kyle-Lagann and Nuna. Our members would love to serve u!! (in their silly cat form) It also has a seating place in front of the guild arena.
- ⛩️Small shrine above the lake from our previous builder who no longer plays the game. Enjoy the nature blooming on it. (lighting is especially pretty at night!) 
- 🐴Horse statue that is dedicated to our tank player Kyle-Lagann. He keeps our guild arena alive. 
- ⚓Hot tubs on top of a ship. We don't know how the ship got there, but might as well use it for our own benefits. Have a nice warm bath while enjoying the mountains! 
- 🎵Music stage with seating areas for dance and instrument perfomance~
- 🫖Small tea shop along the way with a beautiful river next to it. Across the bridge there is also a temple that has a small garden.
- 🌳Tree houses in our wannabe colosseum for our fellow cat members to play around!
- And several other locations to sit down and relax. ₍^•⩊•^₎Ⳋ

name: SG神话
lore:
SG神话! is a Singaporean Guild ( if it is not so obvious xD) - built to honor the pride, culture, and breathtaking landmarks of Singapore.

From the dazzling skyline of Marina Bay to the timeless charm hidden within the Lion City, our guild was created to showcase the beauty and spirit of Singapore to all who visit.

Here, travelers and adventurers alike are welcomed to explore, admire, and be amazed by the wonders that make Singapore truly unforgettable. Step into our world, witness the legend behind the Lion City, and become part of the story.

name: ༻ ॐ ༺ 𝙱𝙾𝙳𝙷𝙸 ༻ ॐ ༺
lore:
Hidden beneath time, vines and silence, the guildhall stands upon ancient Buddhist ruins long forgotten by the world. 

When Bodhi found it, the structure was not broken, only asleep, reclaimed by nature’s quiet devotion. Rather than erase its past, Bodhi chose to honor it. Stone by stone, the atmospheric halls were restored without disturbing the wild growth that had embraced them, allowing roots, blossoms and history to coexist. What now stands is the revival of a misty sanctuary, once again home to a lively bunch.
whatToVisit:
🪷 Town Square
🪷 Ancient Opera
🪷 Lake-Lounge / Bar
🪷 Bamboo Training Grounds
🪷 Love-boat
🪷 Rekindled Buddha Shrine

name: Kuroya
lore:
In the sanctuary of Kuroya, the four seasons coexist in eternal harmony, guarding a realm where spirit meets art. We at Kuroya believe in being free spirits like seasons that may come n go, enchanting us with its beauty.At its heart lies the lovers Lake, cradling the crimson leaves tree. Here, members tie silk vows to branches, praying for prosperity and the strength of their kinship.

Growth in Kuroya is found through the Twin Arts: the fluid rhythm of dance and the soulful precision of poetry as we move through dungeons,fight both man and beasts. By weaving movement with verse, members master their inner selves. To Kuroya, true success is not gold, but the unbreakable bonds formed beneath the blossoms of a perpetual spring.
whatToVisit:
🌸 Guild Party area
🌸 Crimson Tree lake
🌸 Cafe
🌸 Tea Party

🌸 Auditorium For dance and poetry

name: 貴妃醉 (drunken consort)
lore: our president can do a backflip!
whatToVisit:
**motto**: unity in desolation, prosperity in the cold
**theme**: *water margin* outlaw spirit meets gritty wuxia realism

**1. concept**
◆style: **"desolate grandeur"** —raw power and solitude over luxury

◆atmosphere: a rugged, mysterious stronghold with a heavy, grounded presence


**2. visuals & materials**
◆textures: weathered dark timber, grey brick masonry walls and sand path

◆color palette: black wood, white snow, and crimson maple for a **high-contrast vibe**

◆lighting: chilling blue light reflecting off rivers of thawing ice during the winter-spring transition


**3. layout**
◆the nexus: an **octagonal formation** centered on the base

◆experience: a **centralized yet open-world** experience


**4. interest & charm**
◆the "must-have": no stronghold is complete without **adorable cats🐱 ** wandering through the rugged landscape, adding a touch of warmth to the cold wuxia world.

screenshotSections.label: backyard landscape (inspired by "midnight blades" base style)
martial arts arena building with wave-form roofing

name: DrunkenFist
lore: ˚.⋆𓂃 𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 Welcome to Drunkenfist’s Tropical Oasis!  𓆝 𓆟 𓆞 𓂃⋆.˚
whatToVisit:
**♡ Arena & Spawn:** Offers a Madiao Card patio, seats to sit on your friend or partners lap, and a bar to drown your sorrows at after a loss. Watch your friends get ruthlessly combo’d while sitting on the rooftop ledge, or claim the Iron Throne to assert your dominance

**♡ Water Arena:** Test your skills as you walk on water in this spar arena. Includes a two story building with heavily guarded treasure on the first floor, while the second floor offers a training room and a tiny sparring arena

**♡ Bar:** Located under the arch where you can sit back, drink, relax, and enjoy the scenery while hanging out with friends

**♡ Garden / Tunnel**: Zen gardens, picnic area, ponds, and more, all leading into the rave tunnel (definitely worth visiting at night)

**♡ Wedding Hall & Reception Area:** Open bar, Food not provided

**♡ Theater:** For community events. Equipped with plenty of seating and private prep areas
 
**♡ Bath House / Hot Springs:** Soak in a warm bath then visit the massage parlor for even more relaxation

**♡ Maze:** Twists, turns, and surprises await around every corner

**♡ Parkour:** Fight your way to the throne for the ultimate victory photo, then continue skyward into Extreme Mode parkour… if you dare 

**Additional Features:**

♡ River Walkway


Current: Yes

- ศาลา การ "ปลาเรียง" *Thai * or You can call "Fish Row" or "Sashimi" Pavilion, Its come form the word play of making 
⛪ " ศาลา " = Pavilion 
🐟 " ปลาเรียง " =  Row of fishes 
⛪🙏  "ศาลา การ **เปรียญ**" Is commonly know as a main pavilion in every Thai temple.
Word [🙏 "เปรียญ" Pla Leaing ] and [🐟"ปลาเรียง" Plaa Leaing] both pronounce similarly 😛

- Sea Boxing Arena [ มวยทะเล Muay Talay ] Fun duel activity, Try your best to kick your opponent down in the water lol [ winning with most point ]

name: Extemporal
lore: Pretty much my first true build, trying to figure out the mechanics and quirks of building. The base is meant to be more of an open concept with paths interconnected and flowing. I have a couple nooks and crannies, but for the most part, the base is meant to be cohesive and traversable.
whatToVisit:
Cave tunnel
Dining/bar entrance
Zen garden building
Graveyard
Arena viewing area
Floating pavilion

name: ROCKS-D
lore:
An ancient lakeside empire once known for its grandiose halls, temples, and elegant terraces. 
After a great catastrophe, parts of the realm sank beneath the waters, leaving flooded ruins and broken statues scattered along the shore. Now, only fragments of its former glory remain, echoing the memory of a forgotten golden age.
whatToVisit:
- The sunken Lake
- the forgotten library 
- lovebird pavilion
- The Grand Hall 
- duskfall garden 
- Colosseum

name: Gangstars
lore:
Get lost among the meandering garden paths...
Ascend the stairway to heaven and sip of the divine nectar...
View it all from atop the robust palace walls...
whatToVisit:
- Arena Stadium and Bar
- Entry Pagoda Complex
- Stairway to Heaven... and Tea House
- Palace & Royal Quarters
- Front & Rear Gardens with cozy photo-ops
- Lake Dock to take in peace and tranquility
- Hidden Dungeon for our enemies
- *Take a bath* in strange places to visit the secret lair
- and more...

name: AMP Guild Base
lore: Forged not by war, but by friendship, laughter, and countless battles fought side by side, our guild stands as more than a clan — we are family. Whether we go by Kittens or Roaches, every member carries the same bond: loyalty, chaos, and a home that endures through every victory and defeat. In this world, names may change and legends may fade, but the family we built will remain.
whatToVisit:
(1) Our AMP sign! 
(2) Come to our Guild Party
(3) Nanami’s Architectural designs!
(4) Our floating zen garden! 
(5) Our lake!
(6) Our flower shop!

name: Bingo Wipeout
lore: A realm of crimson trees, ancient ruins, hidden paths, and forgotten beauty. Wander through scarlet forests, explore lost structures buried by time, and uncover quiet corners where every place tells a story.
whatToVisit:
- Arena built on ruins
- the beautiful anime/ demon shrine inspired restaurant/bar
-mysterious red paths to make u feel like you are in wonderland.

name: SNEJNAYA
lore: A snowy castle of the White Queen, adorned with white and red roses, where winter silence, ancient vows, and forgotten legends linger in the air.
whatToVisit:
•    The Rose Garden with Sword Statues — where beauty and steel stand side by side.
•    The Castle Library — home to old chronicles, secrets, and hidden knowledge.
•    The Watchtower and Bridge — a high vantage point overlooking the frozen lands and the castle below.

name: HoNK
lore: Mountain Village Dragon Temple
whatToVisit:
Take a nice tour trough chill lake area before that u can spar in the huge Arena inspired by Gladiator. 
Then u can move up towards the mountain village and enjoy the nature, small huts and alot of places to chill. 
Near the lake u can visit the library. 
And last but not least the chills of the of our HoNK Dragon temple 🙂

name: Mythralis
lore:
We crossed rivers and mountains, drifted through the chaos beneath heaven, chasing glory through bloodstained roads and endless snowlands.

Rising up to glory and renown, we became a sovereign in our own rights.

Countless twists of fate did we endure... before we finally loosened our grip on all we could not release learning to forget what could never truly be forgotten..

"It's myth and metallis, it's a symbolism that we thought about, a guild forged from legends but hardened through endless battle"

Mythralis(M)
(Lore Credits to Kasuemi & AshKeeper)
whatToVisit:
-Main Guild Hall

-Sky 8-direction Pavilion
